---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug

---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Run `luckyd-code`
2. Type `...`
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include the full error message/traceback if applicable.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11 / macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12]
- LuckyD Code version: [run `luckyd-code --version` or `/version` inside the app]
- Install method: [pip / source]

## Additional context
Any other context (screenshots, logs, `.env` config — **never paste your API key**).
